Package neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Class OperationalEnvelopeEvaluator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.envelope.OperationalEnvelopeEvaluator
public final class OperationalEnvelopeEvaluator extends Object
Evaluates the operational envelope of a process from registered capacity constraints.

The evaluator is intentionally a thin layer above EquipmentCapacityStrategyRegistry. It ranks margins and produces advisory predictions, while equipment packages remain the source of truth for physical constraints.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public static OperationalEnvelopeReport evaluate(ProcessSystem process)
      Evaluates a process with default prediction settings.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to evaluate
      Returns:
      operational envelope report

    • evaluate

      public static OperationalEnvelopeReport evaluate(ProcessSystem process, Map<String,MarginTrendTracker> history, double predictionHorizonSeconds, boolean includeMitigations)
      Evaluates a process with optional margin history.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to evaluate
      history - margin history keyed by margin key
      predictionHorizonSeconds - maximum time horizon for predictions in seconds
      includeMitigations - true to include generic mitigation suggestions
      Returns:
      operational envelope report

    • collectMargins

      public static List<OperationalMargin> collectMargins(ProcessSystem process)
      Collects operational margins from all process units.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      Returns:
      ranked margin list

    • buildPredictions

      private static List<TripPrediction> buildPredictions(List<OperationalMargin> margins, Map<String,MarginTrendTracker> trackers, double predictionHorizonSeconds, double currentTimestampSeconds)
      Builds trip predictions from margin history.
      Parameters:
      margins - current margin list
      trackers - margin history trackers
      predictionHorizonSeconds - maximum prediction horizon in seconds
      currentTimestampSeconds - current timestamp in seconds
      Returns:
      sorted prediction list

    • buildMitigations

      private static List<MitigationSuggestion> buildMitigations(List<OperationalMargin> margins)
      Builds mitigation suggestions for warning or worse margins.
      Parameters:
      margins - current margin list
      Returns:
      sorted mitigation suggestions

    • nextTimestampForTracker

      private static double nextTimestampForTracker(MarginTrendTracker tracker, double fallbackTimestampSeconds)
      Selects a timestamp for the current sample without mixing relative and epoch histories.
      Parameters:
      tracker - trend tracker with optional existing samples
      fallbackTimestampSeconds - fallback timestamp in seconds
      Returns:
      timestamp for the current sample

    • copyHistory

      private static Map<String,MarginTrendTracker> copyHistory(Map<String,MarginTrendTracker> history)
      Copies history into a mutable map.
      Parameters:
      history - source history, may be null
      Returns:
      mutable tracker map

    • requireProcess

      private static void requireProcess(ProcessSystem process)
      Validates a process argument.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the process is null
